info.title: TerminalGuiDesigner does for Terminal.Gui what the Windows Forms Designer does for WinForms
info.description: Command line visual designer tool for creating Terminal.Gui C# applications.  Create and edit Termianl.Gui views as easily as you could with the Windows Forms Designer.  All generated code is contained in a separate file (e.g. MyControl.Designer.cs).  Run the tool by calling directly from the command line 'TerminalGuiDesigner'

options.name: -v
options.description: The type of root View to create (e.g. Window, Dialog)

options.name: -n
options.description: The C# namespace to be used for the View code generated

options.name: -d
options.description:
(Default: v2) Driver to use. v2, v2net, v2win, WindowsDriver,
CursesDriver or NetDriver

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: New to create or existing file to open.
